sentences.target: Ich sehe den Star im Fernsehen.

translations.de: Ich sehe den Star im Fernsehen.
translations.en: I see the star on TV.
translations.es: Veo a la estrella en la tele.
translations.fr: Je vois la star à la télé.
translations.zh-Hans: 我在电视上看到那位明星。
translations.yue: 我喺電視度睇到嗰位明星。
translations.vi: Tôi thấy ngôi sao trên tivi.
translations.nl: Ik zie de ster op tv.
translations.hi: मैं टीवी पर उस सितारे को देख रहा हूँ.
translations.id: Aku melihat bintang itu di TV.
translations.ja: テレビでそのスターを見ています。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite verb, present indicative 1st person singular; main predicate, transitive.
Definite article, accusative masculine singular; marks the direct object.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object (a celebrity in context).
Contraction of ‘in dem’ (preposition + definite article); introduces a dative locative PP modifying the verb.
Common noun, neuter; object of the preposition ‘im’, denotes the medium of appearance.

sentences.target: Der Star spricht heute über den Film.
sentences.reading: /deːɐ̯ ʃtaːɐ̯ ʃpʁɪçt ˈhɔʏtə ˈyːbɐ deːn fɪlm/

translations.de: Der Star spricht heute über den Film.
translations.ipa: /deːɐ̯ ʃtaːɐ̯ ʃpʁɪçt ˈhɔʏtə ˈyːbɐ deːn fɪlm/
translations.en: The star is speaking about the film today.
translations.es: La estrella habla hoy sobre la película.
translations.fr: La star parle aujourd'hui du film.
translations.it: Oggi la star parla del film.
translations.ko: 그 스타가 오늘 영화에 대해 이야기하고 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 那位明星今天谈论这部电影。
translations.yue: 嗰位明星今日講緊嗰套電影。
translations.pt: A estrela está falando sobre o filme hoje.
translations.vi: Ngôi sao hôm nay đang nói về bộ phim.
translations.nl: De ster praat vandaag over de film.
translations.hu: A sztár ma a filmről beszél.
translations.hi: वह सितारा आज फिल्म के बारे में बात कर रहा है.
translations.el: Ο σταρ σήμερα μιλάει για την ταινία.
translations.nb: Kjendisen snakker om filmen i dag.
translations.id: Hari ini bintang itu berbicara tentang film.
translations.sv: Stjärnan pratar om filmen i dag.
translations.da: Stjernen taler i dag om filmen.
translations.ja: そのスターは今日映画について話しています。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, nominative masculine singular; marks the subject.
Common noun, masculine singular; subject of the sentence.
Finite verb, present indicative 3rd person singular; main predicate, takes a PP with ‘über’ for topic.
Temporal adverb; modifies the verb, indicating time.
Preposition governing accusative; introduces the topic PP.
Definite article, accusative masculine singular; determiner of the prepositional object.
Common noun, masculine singular; object of the preposition ‘über’.

sentences.target: Kinder warten vor dem Hotel auf den Star.
sentences.reading: /ˈkɪndɐ ˈvaʁtən foːɐ̯ deːm hoˈtɛl aʊf deːn ʃtaːɐ̯/

translations.de: Kinder warten vor dem Hotel auf den Star.
translations.ipa: /ˈkɪndɐ ˈvaʁtən foːɐ̯ deːm hoˈtɛl aʊf deːn ʃtaːɐ̯/
translations.en: Children are waiting outside the hotel for the star.
translations.es: Los niños esperan a la estrella fuera del hotel.
translations.fr: Des enfants attendent la star devant l'hôtel.
translations.it: I bambini aspettano la star fuori dall'hotel.
translations.ko: 아이들이 호텔 밖에서 그 스타를 기다리고 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 孩子们在酒店外等那位明星。
translations.yue: 啲小朋友喺酒店門口等嗰位明星。
translations.pt: As crianças esperam a estrela do lado de fora do hotel.
translations.vi: Bọn trẻ đang chờ ngôi sao ở ngoài khách sạn.
translations.nl: Kinderen wachten buiten het hotel op de ster.
translations.uk: Діти чекають на зірку біля готелю.
translations.hu: A gyerekek a hotel előtt várják a sztárt.
translations.hi: बच्चे होटल के बाहर उस सितारे का इंतज़ार कर रहे हैं.
translations.pl: Dzieci czekają na gwiazdę przed hotelem.
translations.el: Παιδιά περιμένουν τον σταρ έξω από το ξενοδοχείο.
translations.nb: Barn venter på kjendisen utenfor hotellet.
translations.id: Anak-anak menunggu bintang itu di luar hotel.
translations.sv: Barn väntar på stjärnan utanför hotellet.
translations.ro: Copiii așteaptă vedeta în fața hotelului.
translations.cs: Děti čekají na hvězdu před hotelem.
translations.da: Børn venter på stjernen uden for hotellet.
translations.ja: 子どもたちはホテルの外でそのスターを待っています。

tokens.explanation: Common noun, plural nominative; subject of the sentence.
Finite verb, present indicative 3rd person plural; main predicate, typically takes PP ‘auf’ for the object of waiting.
Preposition governing dative; introduces a locative PP.
Definite article, dative singular (here with neuter ‘Hotel’); determiner of the PP object.
Common noun, neuter singular; object of the preposition ‘vor’, indicating location.
Preposition; with ‘warten’ forms a PP selecting accusative meaning ‘wait for’, introducing the object of waiting.
Definite article, accusative masculine singular; determiner of the PP object.
Common noun, masculine singular; object of the preposition ‘auf’ (the person being waited for).

sentences.target: Ich mag den Star aus dieser Serie.
sentences.reading: /ɪç maːk deːn ʃtaːɐ̯ aʊs ˈdiːzɐ ˈzeːʁi̯ə/

translations.de: Ich mag den Star aus dieser Serie.
translations.ipa: /ɪç maːk deːn ʃtaːɐ̯ aʊs ˈdiːzɐ ˈzeːʁi̯ə/
translations.en: I like the star from this series.
translations.es: Me gusta la estrella de esta serie.
translations.fr: J'aime la star de cette série.
translations.it: Mi piace la star di questa serie.
translations.zh-Hans: 我喜欢这部剧里的那位明星。
translations.yue: 我鍾意呢套劇入面嗰位明星。
translations.ru: Мне нравится звезда из этого сериала.
translations.pt: Eu gosto da estrela desta série.
translations.he: אני אוהב את הכוכב מהסדרה הזאת.
translations.vi: Tôi thích ngôi sao của phim bộ này.
translations.ar: أنا أحب النجم في هذا المسلسل.
translations.nl: Ik vind de ster uit deze serie leuk.
translations.uk: Мені подобається зірка з цього серіалу.
translations.hu: Tetszik a sztár ebből a sorozatból.
translations.hi: मुझे इस सीरीज़ का वह सितारा पसंद है.
translations.el: Μου αρέσει ο σταρ από αυτή τη σειρά.
translations.nb: Jeg liker stjernen fra denne serien.
translations.id: Aku suka bintang dari serial ini.
translations.sv: Jag gillar stjärnan från den här serien.
translations.ro: Îmi place vedeta din acest serial.
translations.cs: Líbí se mi hvězda z tohoto seriálu.
translations.da: Jeg kan godt lide stjernen fra denne serie.
translations.ja: このシリーズのスターが好きです。
